ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "pangaea_id" TEXT /* ID assigned by PANGAEA for the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the sample was collected */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment from which the sample was collected (e.g., ocean, soil) */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth at which the sample was collected (for marine environments) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation at which the sample was collected (for terrestrial environments) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of collection */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level at the time of collection */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity level (for marine environments) */,
  "moisture" REAL /* Moisture content (for terrestrial environments) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_environment_type FOREIGN KEY ("environment_type") REFERENCES environment_types ("environment_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "diversity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diversity metric entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample this metric relates to */,
  "observed_richness" REAL /* Observed richness of the microbial community */,
  "chao1_estimation" REAL /* Chao1 richness estimation value */,
  "shannon_index" REAL /* Shannon diversity index value */,
  "inv_simpson_index" REAL /* Inverse Simpson diversity index value */,
  "ace_estimation" REAL /* Ace richness estimation value */,
  "pielou_evenness" REAL /* Pielou's evenness index value */,
  "chao2_estimation" REAL /* Chao2 richness estimation value */,
  "gini_simpson_index" REAL /* Gini-Simpson diversity index value */,
  "date_calculated" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (geographical place) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or sub-region of the location */,
  "biome" TEXT /* Biome type (e.g., tropical forest, tundra) */,
  "ecosystem" TEXT /* Ecosystem type (e.g., coral reef, desert) */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone (e.g., temperate, tropical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment_types" (
  "environment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment type */,
  "environment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment type (e.g., Marine, Terrestrial) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment type */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Specific habitat within the environment type */,
  "ecological_role" TEXT /* Ecological role of the environment type */,
  "example_species" TEXT /* Example species found in the environment type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher works */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Research specialization */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_researchers" (
  "sample_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample-researcher association */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample contributed by the researcher */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who contributed the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_researchers_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_researchers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diversity_analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diversity analysis report */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample associated with the report */,
  "generated_on" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "reviewer" TEXT /* Reviewer of the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_analysis_reports_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the sample */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the sample */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data contributor, administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
